textByHashes.60ea8c8ed988a95e40290ab77c913a3e421f469d: That what you are... you tough and strong no?
textByHashes.458e56d2af35ae795fbe4d29c81533aa0fc80305: That what you are... you user of mystic powers no?
textByHashes.414820b79e821ebc3309d1fa6f7bdad5a0fe3f6b: That what you are... you agile and quick no?
textByHashes.91ed756d14591822e9dfdea360ef7f16d4044408: That what you are... you skilled at making things no?
textByHashes.ad74acdc91ecab1aa026c4a0d7a1ccd0d2184218: Silly JalYt, I am TzHaar-Hur, one of the crafters for this city.
textByHashes.5ef8241c5ba1bd8e2f01ac048b04e43b966890fc: There are the wise TzHaar-Mej who guide us, the mighty TzHaar-Ket who guard us, and the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food.
textByHashes.0e756222545ff1b2fb345c16b18fc1bc713746a8: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!
